notes: This timing model uses integer picoseconds frozen from the latest 2026-04-23 RP2350 O3+LTO reference VM rerun.
In the current canonical model, 1 chronon equals 1 measured picosecond on the reference VM implementation.
paths contains the canonical exact per-path chronons from the reference run and is the complete timing view.
Instruction forms derive their timing from the exact paths that reference the same family and form.

paths.name: plus_keep_and_use_carry_reg_16
reference_asm: A PLUS B keep and use carry

paths.name: plus_keep_and_use_carry_reg_24
reference_asm: X PLUS Y keep and use carry

paths.name: minus_keep_and_use_borrow_reg_16
reference_asm: A MINUS B keep and use borrow

paths.name: minus_keep_and_use_borrow_reg_24
reference_asm: X MINUS Y keep and use borrow

paths.name: times_unsigned_keep_high_16
reference_asm: A TIMES B unsigned keep high

paths.name: shift_logical_right_keep_carry_regcount_16
reference_asm: A logical RIGHTSHIFT B keep carry

paths.name: shift_logical_right_keep_carry_regcount_24
reference_asm: X logical RIGHTSHIFT Y keep carry

paths.name: shift_left_carry_step_keep_16
reference_asm: A LEFTSHIFT 1 keep and use carry

paths.name: shift_left_carry_step_keep_24
reference_asm: X LEFTSHIFT 1 keep and use carry

paths.name: shift_right_carry_step_keep_16
reference_asm: A RIGHTSHIFT 1 keep and use carry

paths.name: shift_right_carry_step_keep_24
reference_asm: X RIGHTSHIFT 1 keep and use carry

paths.name: shift_logical_right_carry_step_keep_16
reference_asm: A logical RIGHTSHIFT 1 keep and use carry

paths.name: shift_logical_right_carry_step_keep_24
reference_asm: X logical RIGHTSHIFT 1 keep and use carry

paths.name: jump_conditional_less_than_16_not_taken
reference_asm: JUMP +4 when A LESS THAN B

paths.name: jump_conditional_less_than_16_taken
reference_asm: JUMP +4 when A LESS THAN B
